title: helia daturoides
intro: Helia daturoides, also known as the helia plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helia daturoides include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Helia daturoides plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
